description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large rectangular windows and a clean, geometric facade. The front of the house includes a wide driveway with a blue car parked beside a set of steps leading up to the main entrance, which is flanked by decorative planters. The rear of the house opens to a fenced backyard with a covered patio area, outdoor seating, a hot tub, and a small playhouse. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, complemented by black window frames and subtle landscaping with gravel and shrubs. The house has an open-plan interior visible through the expansive windows, with contemporary furnishings and a spacious layout. The overall aesthetic is sleek and urban, suitable for a high-end residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wide driveway, and a stylish backyard with a covered patio and playhouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, blue car, main entrance with steps, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, upper story, and partial view of the backyard and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, covered patio, hot tub, outdoor seating, and playhouse.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the blue car, driveway, and a clear look at the backyard fence and patio structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, flanked by planters, no porch, and a minimalist door design
